title: Fix blueprint repository cancellation swallowing
description:
From supplemental audit finding 4 (80% confidence): MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync and SearchAsync catch TaskCanceledException and continue into fallback logic. A caller that cancels does not actually get cancellation behavior — the repository continues doing file I/O and additional network calls.

Fix: Check ct.IsCancellationRequested and rethrow (or return immediately) when cancellation was requested by the caller. Only use fallback paths for genuine transient failures, not an explicit abort.

Source: memorysmith_agent_supplemental_audit_findings_2026-06-25.md (Finding 4)
